message.content:
@startuml
' Define the style for the note
note as redNote
  note that is red
end note

note as blueNote
  this is my note on right link and in blue
end note

' Define the style for the actor
actor as dummy
  Dummy
end actor

actor as foo
  Foo
end actor

actor as foo2
  Foo2
end actor

' Define the relationship between dummy and foo
dummy --> foo : A link

' Define the relationship between dummy and foo2
dummy --> foo2 : Another link

' Define the note on the relationship between dummy and foo2
blueNote -> foo2

' Define the note on the relationship between dummy and foo
redNote -> foo

@enduml
